title: Vendor in latest go-selinux
body:
This should fix the issue with iptables being denied execution on
container cleanup

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: I like vendor changes, so easy to review. LGTM once tests green.
